ddl.where:
"reply_target_id" IS NULL
        AND (
          "note_source_id" IS NOT NULL
          OR "article_source_id" IS NOT NULL
          OR "shared_post_id" IS NOT NULL
        )
ddl.name: idx_post_public_local_published

ddl.value:
(
        "translator_id" IS NULL AND
        "translation_requester_id" IS NULL
      ) = ("original_language" IS NULL)
ddl.name: article_content_original_language_check

ddl.value:
CASE
          WHEN "image_type" IS NULL THEN true
          ELSE "image_type" ~ '^image/'
        END
ddl.name: custom_emoji_image_type_check

ddl.value:
CASE
          WHEN "width" IS NULL THEN "height" IS NULL
          ELSE "height" IS NOT NULL AND
               "width" > 0 AND "height" > 0
        END
ddl.name: medium_width_height_check

ddl.value:
CASE "type"
          WHEN 'follow' THEN "post_id" IS NULL
          ELSE "post_id" IS NOT NULL
        END
ddl.name: notification_post_id_check

ddl.value:
CASE "type"
          WHEN 'react'
          THEN "emoji" IS NOT NULL AND "custom_emoji_id" IS NULL
            OR "emoji" IS NULL AND "custom_emoji_id" IS NOT NULL
          ELSE "emoji" IS NULL AND "custom_emoji_id" IS NULL
        END
ddl.name: notification_emoji_check

ddl.value: "image_alt" IS NULL OR "image_url" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: post_link_image_alt_check

ddl.value:
CASE
          WHEN "image_type" IS NULL THEN true
          ELSE "image_type" ~ '^image/' AND
               "image_url" IS NOT NULL
        END
ddl.name: post_link_image_type_check

ddl.value:
CASE
          WHEN "image_width" IS NOT NULL
          THEN "image_url" IS NOT NULL AND
                 "image_height" IS NOT NULL AND
                 "image_width" > 0 AND
                 "image_height" > 0
          WHEN "image_height" IS NOT NULL
          THEN "image_url" IS NOT NULL AND
               "image_width" IS NOT NULL AND
               "image_width" > 0 AND
               "image_height" > 0
          ELSE true
        END
ddl.name: post_link_image_width_height_check

ddl.value:
CASE
          WHEN "width" IS NULL THEN "height" IS NULL
          ELSE "height" IS NOT NULL AND
               "width" > 0 AND "height" > 0
        END
ddl.name: post_medium_width_height_check

ddl.value:
"emoji" IS NOT NULL
          AND length("emoji") > 0
          AND "emoji" !~ '^[[:space:]:]+|[[:space:]:]+$'
          AND "custom_emoji_id" IS NULL
        OR
          "emoji" IS NULL AND "custom_emoji_id" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: reaction_emoji_check
